checks.description: Verify that the sum output S matches the lower 32 bits of the arithmetic sum of inputs A and B after inputs stabilize.
checks.pass_condition: S equals (A + B) modulo 2^32 when inputs are stable.
checks.trigger_condition: When inputs A and B have been held stable for at least one cycle.

checks.description: Verify that the carry-out C32 reflects the overflow of the 32-bit addition of A and B.
checks.pass_condition: C32 equals 1 if (A + B) exceeds 32-bit range, otherwise 0, after inputs stabilize.
checks.trigger_condition: When inputs A and B have been held stable for at least one cycle.

checks.description: Guardrail: outputs must not change spontaneously when inputs remain stable.
checks.pass_condition: If A and B do not change, S and C32 remain constant across cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: Whenever inputs A and B are observed stable for a cycle.
